# Homepage Design Prompt

## Project Overview
- **Business Name:** Real Estate
- **Website Layout:** Landing Page
- **Theme Mode:** Light Mode
- **Brand Colors:** Primary (#e2c42c), Secondary (#000000)
- **Fonts:** Heading (Playfair Display), Body (Inter)
- **Overall Goal:** Deliver a luxury real estate landing page that blends editorial photography-driven elegance from thxhouston.com with the structured, modular content architecture of realestia.webflow.io. The result is a clean, high-end, fully static light-mode page using gold accents, warm off-white section alternation, full-bleed imagery, and a refined typographic hierarchy — communicating authority, exclusivity, and trust.

---

## Reference Direction

**Reference 1 — https://thxhouston.com/**
- Luxury real estate aesthetic: editorial photography, warm gold tones, clean white backgrounds
- Hero is full-bleed with centered logo lockup and italic tagline — no visible navigation over the image
- Agent Bio uses a two-column portrait + text layout with gold social icons and pill-shaped outline buttons
- Services Grid is a 3-column full-bleed image card row with dark overlay text labels at card bottoms
- Testimonials section uses a full-bleed background photo with dark overlay, gold quote icon, and italic white body text
- Past Transactions uses a horizontal card carousel with SOLD badges, gold arrows, and outlined VIEW ALL button
- Email Opt-In Banner is a dark (#000000) strip with inline form and gold submit button
- Work With Us CTA is a full-bleed photo section with dark overlay and centered gold-outlined pill button
- Footer is white with gold logo, three nav columns, social icons, and a bottom divider with copyright
- Gold (#e2c42c) is used exclusively for logos, buttons, badges, icons, and accent lines — never decoratively overused

**Reference 2 — https://realestia.webflow.io/home-one**
- Modern luxury layout with structured content blocks, warm off-white (#f5f0e8) alternating with white for visual rhythm
- Sticky navigation bar with logo left, links center/right, gold CTA button far right
- Hero is full-bleed dark with large left-aligned Playfair Display headline and a bottom thumbnail strip
- About Us uses a two-column split with lifestyle photo left and gold-labeled text block right
- Property Listings Grid is a 3×2 card grid with gold price labels, property tags, and subtle card shadows
- CTA section uses a dark background image with a floating white contact form card on the right
- Stats Bar is a full-width black strip with gold numbers and icons in four equal columns
- Search Property section uses a full-width search bar row with dropdown selectors and a gold pill button
- Destinations section uses a 4-column tall image grid with dark gradient overlays and white location labels
- Footer is full-width black with multi-column link and contact layout

**Combined Visual Direction:**
Merge the warm editorial photography and gold accent restraint of Reference 1 with the structured modular block layout and content depth of Reference 2. Use full-bleed sections for hero, testimonials, CTA, and stats. Use white and warm off-white (#f5f0e8) alternating backgrounds for content sections. Apply gold (#e2c42c) only to: logo, prices, CTA buttons, badges, accent labels, icons, and decorative rules. All section headings in Playfair Display. All UI text, body copy, nav, forms, and metadata in Inter. Max-width content container: 1200px centered with auto margins.

---

## Content Source
**REALISTIC DUMMY CONTENT** — No specific content was provided. Generate professional, realistic real estate dummy copy throughout all sections. Use plausible agent names, property addresses, prices, testimonials, stats, and service descriptions consistent with a luxury residential real estate brand.

---

## Sections

---

### 1. Navigation Bar
**Section Type:** Sticky Top Navigation

**Combined Design Notes:**
Drawn from Reference 2's sticky nav structure with Reference 1's gold accent button style. White background, ~64px height, subtle 1px bottom border in #e8e8e8. Logo on the far left in Playfair Display bold ~20px in gold (#e2c42c). Navigation links centered or right-aligned in Inter 14px #333333: Home, Properties, About, Testimonials, Contact. Far right: a gold (#e2c42c) filled pill button "Get in Touch" in Inter bold 13px black text, ~40px tall, ~130px wide, 24px border-radius. No drop shadows on nav. Sticky behavior — remains fixed at top on scroll.

**Content Direction:**
- Logo: "Real Estate" in Playfair Display gold
- Nav Links: Home, Properties, About, Testimonials, Contact
- CTA Button: "Get in Touch"

**Visual Direction:**
Single horizontal row. Logo left. Nav links right-of-center. CTA button far right. White background. Clean and minimal — no decorative elements. Inter 14px for all nav text.

---

### 2. Hero Section
**Section Type:** Full-Bleed Photographic Hero

**Combined Design Notes:**
Merges Reference 1's centered logo lockup hero with Reference 2's large left-aligned headline approach. Full-width, full-bleed background photograph of a luxury city skyline or landmark residential property at golden hour/dusk. Section height: ~600px. A dark overlay at 50% opacity (#000000) covers the image for text legibility. Content is centered horizontally and vertically. Top element: brand logo "Real Estate" in Playfair Display bold ~64px gold (#e2c42c), centered. Beneath the logo: a thin horizontal gold decorative rule ~80px wide, centered. Below the rule: a short italic tagline in Inter ~16px white — "Your Trusted Partner in Luxury Living." No navigation bar visible over the hero image. No thumbnail strip in this merged version to preserve the clean editorial feel of Reference 1.

**Content Direction:**
- Logo/Brand Name: "Real Estate"
- Tagline: "Your Trusted Partner in Luxury Living."
- Decorative rule beneath logo in gold

**Visual Direction:**
Full-bleed image with dark overlay. Centered vertical and horizontal content stack: logo → gold rule → italic tagline. No buttons in hero. No nav overlay. Clean, editorial, and minimal. Image uses object-fit: cover.

---

### 3. Property Search Bar Section
**Section Type:** Search Filter Bar

**Combined Design Notes:**
Drawn from Reference 2's Search Your Property section. Warm off-white (#f5f0e8) background. Centered Playfair Display H2 ~36px black: "Find Your Perfect Property." Inter subtitle below in #666666 ~15px: "Search from our curated portfolio of luxury homes, condos, and estates." Below: a full-width search bar row (max-width 900px, centered) containing three dropdown selectors — Location, Property Type, Price Range — each in white background with 1px #dddddd border, Inter 14px #444444, 12px padding, 6px border-radius. Far right of the row: a gold (#e2c42c) filled pill button "Find Property" in Inter bold 13px black text, 24px border-radius, ~48px tall. Section padding: 80px top and bottom.

**Content Direction:**
- Heading: "Find Your Perfect Property"
- Subtext: "Search from our curated portfolio of luxury homes, condos, and estates."
- Dropdowns: Location, Property Type, Price Range
- Button: "Find Property"

**Visual Direction:**
Centered heading and subtitle stack. Below: a single horizontal row containing three equal-width dropdown inputs and one gold CTA button. Warm off-white background. Clean, functional, and minimal.

---

### 4. Your Perfect Place Awaits — Property Preview Grid
**Section Type:** 3-Column Image Grid

**Combined Design Notes:**
Drawn from Reference 2's "Your Perfect Place Awaits" section. White background. Centered Playfair Display H2 ~36px black: "Your Perfect Place Awaits." Inter subtitle below in #666666 ~15px: "Explore a handpicked selection of exceptional properties." Below: a 3-column image grid of property photographs, equal height ~220px, 4–6px border-radius, 20px gap. Images use object-fit: cover. No text overlays on images. Section padding: 80px top and bottom.

**Content Direction:**
- Heading: "Your Perfect Place Awaits"
- Subtext: "Explore a handpicked selection of exceptional properties."
- 3 property photographs (luxury interiors or exteriors)

**Visual Direction:**
White background. Centered heading + subtitle. Below: 3-column equal-height image grid. Clean, no card chrome — images only with slight border-radius. Generous section padding.

---

### 5. About / Agent Bio Section
**Section Type:** Two-Column Split — Agent Introduction

**Combined Design Notes:**
Merges Reference 1's Agent Bio layout with Reference 2's About Us section. Warm off-white (#f5f0e8) background. ~100px vertical padding. Two-column layout at max-width 1200px: Left column (~45% width) contains a professional portrait or lifestyle photograph of agent/team (~280×340px, natural crop, 4px border-radius). Right column (~55% width) contains: a small gold uppercase Inter label "BROKER | OWNER" with ~2px letter-spacing at 12px. Below: Playfair Display H2 ~40px black "Meet Alexandra Harlow." Below: 3–4 lines of Inter body text ~15px #444444 describing expertise in luxury residential real estate, buyer/seller representation, and market knowledge. Below text: a row of small circular outline-style social media icon buttons in gold (#e2c42c) — Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn. Below icons: a gold text link "Learn More →" in Inter 14px. Below the portrait on the left: a small pill-shaped outline button in gold "INSTAGRAM →" in Inter 12px.

**Content Direction:**
- Gold label: "BROKER | OWNER"
- Heading: "Meet Alexandra Harlow"
- Body: "With over 15 years of experience in luxury residential real estate, Alexandra Harlow has built a reputation for delivering exceptional results. Specializing in high-end buyer and seller representation across the city's most sought-after neighborhoods, she combines deep market expertise with a personalized, white-glove approach to every transaction."
- Social icons: Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn
- Text link: "Learn More →"
- Pill button below photo: "INSTAGRAM →"

**Visual Direction:**
Two-column layout. Portrait left, text block right. Warm off-white background. Gold used for label, social icons, pill button, and text link. Inter body text in #444444. Playfair Display for H2. No card chrome or shadows.

---

### 6. Services Grid Section
**Section Type:** 3-Column Full-Bleed Image Card Row

**Combined Design Notes:**
Directly from Reference 1's Services Grid. Full-width, 3-column grid with 4px gaps between columns. Each column is a tall image card (~300px height) with a full-bleed property or interior photograph using object-fit: cover. At the bottom of each card: a semi-transparent dark overlay bar (~60px tall, #000000 at 65% opacity) with a white Playfair Display text label centered: "Home Search," "Home Valuation," "Contact Us." No border-radius on cards. No additional card chrome. Section has no top/bottom padding — it bleeds edge to edge.

**Content Direction:**
- Card 1: Label "Home Search" — luxury exterior property photo
- Card 2: Label "Home Valuation" — luxury interior photo
- Card 3: Label "Contact Us" — lifestyle/neighborhood photo

**Visual Direction:**
Full-width 3-column grid. No section padding. Cards are flush. Dark overlay label bar at card bottom. White Playfair Display labels. Gold is not used in this section — dark overlay with white text only.

---

### 7. Property Listings Grid Section
**Section Type:** 3×2 Property Card Grid

**Combined Design Notes:**
Drawn from Reference 2's "Experience the Extraordinary" listings grid. White background. Small gold uppercase Inter pre-label ~12px centered: "FEATURED LISTINGS." Below: Playfair Display H2 ~36px black centered: "Exceptional Properties, Curated for You." Section padding: 80–100px top and bottom. Below heading: a 3×2 grid of property cards, 20px gap. Each card: full-width property photo top (~200px tall, object-fit: cover, top border-radius 6px). Below photo: white card body with 16px padding. Small gold uppercase Inter tag ~11px: "APARTMENT" or "HOUSE" or "PENTHOUSE." Property address in Inter semi-bold 15px #222222. Bed/bath/sqft icons with Inter 13px #888888 values in a horizontal row. Gold (#e2c42c) price label right-aligned in Inter bold 15px. Card has white background, subtle box-shadow (0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)), 6px border-radius.

**Content Direction:**
- Pre-label: "FEATURED LISTINGS"
- Heading: "Exceptional Properties, Curated for You"
- Card 1: PENTHOUSE — 1420 Skyline Blvd, Unit 42 | 3 bed / 3 bath / 2,800 sqft | $4,200,000

- Card 6: APARTMENT — 55 Lakeview Terrace, Unit 3A | 2 bed / 2 bath / 1,200 sqft | $1,450,000

White background. Centered pre-label + heading. 3×2 card grid below. Cards have photo top, white body, gold price right-aligned, subtle shadow, 6px border-radius. Gold used only for tag labels and price values.

---

### 8. Stats Bar Section
**Section Type:** Full-Width Dark Statistics Strip

**Combined Design Notes:**
Directly from Reference 2's Stats Bar. Full-width black (#000000) horizontal strip, ~160px tall. 4 equal columns, centered content per column. Each column: a gold (#e2c42c) icon at top (house, key, building, handshake — simple line icon style), a large gold number in Inter bold ~48px, and a white Inter label below ~14px. No borders between columns. Section bleeds full width.

Full-width black strip. 4 equal columns. Gold icons and numbers. White labels. No card chrome. No dividers between columns. Clean and bold.

**Section Type:** Two-Column Split — Featured Listing Highlight

Drawn from Reference 2's "Our Recent Project" section. Warm off-white (#f5f0e8) background. ~80px vertical padding. Below: a gold outlined pill button "View Details" in Inter bold 13px black text, 24px border-radius, ~44px tall, ~140px wide.

## Static Design Rules

- **Reference Look & Feel:** Apply the editorial luxury aesthetic of thxhouston.com (warm gold accents, full-bleed photography, clean white sections) combined with the structured modular block layout of realestia.webflow.io (off-white alternation, floating form cards, stats bar, destination grid).
- **Brand Colors:** Gold (#e2c42c) used exclusively for: logo, CTA buttons, badges, prices, accent labels, icons, decorative rules, and outlined buttons. Black (#000000) for headings, dark overlays, and the stats bar. White (#ffffff) and warm off-white (#f5f0e8) alternate as section backgrounds.
- **Fonts:** All headings, section labels, and logo text in Playfair Display. All body copy, nav links, form fields, metadata, captions, and UI labels in Inter.
- **Layout:** Single-column full-width landing page. Max-width content container: 1200px centered with auto margins. All sections stack vertically with clean horizontal cuts — no diagonal, curved, or angled dividers.
- **NO ANIMATIONS:** No page load animations, scroll animations, motion effects, transition systems, stagger animations, moving elements, animated skeletons, animated loaders, or micro-interactions of any kind.
- **NO HOVER EFFECTS:** No button hover states, card hover states, image hover effects, link hover effects, hover shadows, hover transitions, or any interaction-based styling. The design is 100% static.
- **NO FILLER:** No design system token maps, typography scale tables, spacing system documentation, or over-detailed CSS specifications.
- **Images:** All images use object-fit: cover. Full-bleed sections bleed edge to edge. Content section images are contained within the 1200px container.
- **Buttons:** Pill-shaped buttons use 24–32px border-radius. Standard buttons use 4–8px border-radius. Gold filled buttons use black Inter bold text. Gold outlined buttons use black or gold Inter bold text.
- **Cards:** Subtle box-shadow (0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)). 4–6px border-radius on property and listing cards.
- **Mobile:** All multi-column layouts stack to single column on mobile. Navigation collapses. Form fields stack vertically. Card grids become single-column.

---

## Final Output

A complete, fully static luxury real estate landing page for "Real Estate" built on a light theme with gold (#e2c42c) and black (#000000) as the brand system. The page flows through 15 sections in this order:

1. **Navigation Bar** — Sticky white nav with gold logo and gold CTA pill button
2. **Hero Section** — Full-bleed golden-hour property photo with centered gold logo lockup and italic tagline
3. **Property Search Bar** — Warm off-white section with dropdown selectors and gold Find Property button
4. **Your Perfect Place Awaits** — White background 3-column property image grid
5. **About / Agent Bio** — Warm off-white two-column portrait + text block with gold social icons
6. **Services Grid** — Full-bleed 3-column image card row with dark overlay text labels
7. **Property Listings Grid** — White background 3×2 property card grid with gold prices and tags
8. **Stats Bar** — Full-width black strip with gold icons, numbers, and white labels
9. **Featured Split Section** — Warm off-white two-column featured listing with gold price and outlined button
10. **Testimonials** — Full-bleed photo with dark overlay, gold quote icon, italic white testimonial
11. **Past Transactions** — White background horizontal 3-card carousel with SOLD badges and gold navigation
12. **Destinations / Neighborhoods** — Warm off-white 4-column tall image grid with dark gradient overlays
13. **CTA / Contact Form** — Full-bleed dark photo with floating white form card and gold submit button
14. **Email Opt-In Banner** — Full-width black strip with inline email form and gold SUBMIT button
15. **Footer** — White multi-column footer with gold logo, nav links, social icons, and copyright strip

All sections use Playfair Display for headings and Inter for body text. Gold (#e2c42c) is applied with restraint as the sole accent color. The page is fully static with no animations, no hover effects, and no interactive states.
